text:
locate the information you need, please contact ResDAC.
| SAS Name | Variable Name | 
|---|---|
| MODEL_ID | Model Identifier | 
| ENTITY_ID | Entity Identifier | 
| PRVDR_TIN | Taxpayer Identification Number of Provider | 
| NPI | Provider's National Provider Identifier | 
| PRVDR_CCN | CMS Certification Number of Provider | 
| START_DATE | Provider Start Date | 
| END_DATE | Provider End Date | 
| PART_TYPE | Provider Participation Type |
